name: k6-performance-suite
description: k6 performance testing suite — multi-env, fluent HTTP client, SLA strategy, hardened CI/CD.

scripts.test:foundations: npm run preready && npm run k6 -- tests/foundations/foundations-test.ts
scripts.test:load: npm run preready && npm run k6 -- tests/load/load-test.ts
scripts.test:stress: npm run preready && npm run k6 -- tests/stress/stress-test.ts
scripts.test:soak: npm run preready && npm run k6 -- tests/soak/soak-test.ts
scripts.test:scenarios: npm run preready && npm run k6 -- tests/scenarios/ecommerce-journey.ts
scripts.test:fast: npm run test:foundations && npm run test:load && npm run test:scenarios
scripts.test:full: npm run test:fast && npm run test:stress && npm run test:soak
scripts.report:local: npm run preready && npm run k6 -- --out json=reports/results.json tests/load/load-test.ts
scripts.ci:verify: npm run lint && npm run format:check && npm run typecheck
